name: WhatsApp Trigger
description: Automatically trigger a workflow when a WhatsApp message is received.

settings.label: Monitor Contact / Number
settings.description: The WhatsApp contact or number to monitor for new messages.

settings.label: Polling Interval (seconds)
settings.description: How often to check for new messages.

settings.label: Message Fetch Limit
settings.description: Number of recent messages to fetch per check.
